mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WATCHLIST WHERE ci_value IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND REGEXP_COUNT(ci_value, ':') != 1

SELECT watchlist_id AS watchlistId, ci_value AS ciValue FROM WATCHLIST WHERE ci_value IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND REGEXP_COUNT(ci_value, ':') != 1 ORDER BY watchlist_id OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM WATCHLIST WHERE birth_date IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND REGEXP_COUNT(birth_date, ':') != 1

SELECT watchlist_id AS watchlistId, birth_date AS birthDate FROM WATCHLIST WHERE birth_date IS NOT NULL AND deleted_yn = 'N' AND REGEXP_COUNT(birth_date, ':') != 1 ORDER BY watchlist_id OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
